all.en: Dear Colleagues, I am writing to share an important development that will shape the future of our organization for years to come.
all.zh: 親愛的同仁，我寫信是要分享一項將形塑我們組織未來數年發展的重要消息。

all.en: After several months of confidential negotiations and rigorous due diligence, the Board of Directors has unanimously approved a merger between Northstar Logistics and Pacific Freight Holdings.
all.zh: 經過數月的機密協商與嚴謹的盡職調查後，董事會已一致通過 Northstar Logistics 與 Pacific Freight Holdings 的合併案。

all.en: The definitive agreement was signed yesterday afternoon and was disclosed to the financial markets before trading opened this morning.
all.zh: 最終協議已於昨日下午簽署，並於今早開盤前向金融市場揭露。

all.en: This transaction is best described as a merger of equals rather than a traditional acquisition, since both firms will contribute leadership, capital, and operational expertise to the new entity.
all.zh: 這項交易最適合被形容為對等合併，而非傳統的併購，因為雙方公司都將為新實體貢獻領導階層、資本與營運專業。

all.en: The combined company will operate under the new name Northstar Pacific Group and will rank among the top five freight forwarders in the Asia-Pacific region.
all.zh: 合併後的公司將以 Northstar Pacific Group 的新名稱營運，並躋身亞太地區前五大貨運承攬業者之列。

all.en: Our primary business rationale is straightforward: by combining complementary route networks and shared technology platforms, we expect to unlock significant synergies estimated at 180 million dollars over the next three fiscal years.
all.zh: 我們的主要商業理由很明確：透過整合互補的航線網絡與共享技術平台，我們預期在未來三個會計年度內可釋放預估達一億八千萬美元的綜效。

all.en: These savings will come primarily from procurement consolidation, route optimization, and the elimination of duplicated back-office systems.
all.zh: 這些節省主要來自採購整合、路線優化以及消除重複的後勤系統。

all.en: The headquarters of the new group will remain in Singapore, with regional command centers retained in Taipei, Sydney, and Vancouver.
all.zh: 新集團的總部將維持在新加坡，並在台北、雪梨與溫哥華保留區域指揮中心。

all.en: I am pleased to confirm that our current Chief Financial Officer, Ms. Helena Ortiz, has been appointed as Chief Executive Officer of the combined entity, while I will assume the role of Executive Chairman.
all.zh: 我很高興確認，我們現任財務長 Helena Ortiz 女士已獲任命為合併後實體的執行長，而我將擔任執行董事長一職。

all.en: The transaction is subject to customary regulatory approvals in seven jurisdictions and is expected to close by the end of the third quarter.
all.zh: 本交易須取得七個司法管轄區的例行性主管機關核准，預計將於第三季底前完成交割。

all.en: Between now and the closing date, both companies will continue to operate independently, and you should not change any reporting lines, supplier relationships, or customer commitments.
all.zh: 從現在到交割日之間，兩家公司將持續獨立運作，您不應變更任何匯報關係、供應商往來或客戶承諾。

all.en: An integration management office, jointly staffed by senior leaders from both firms, will be established next week to coordinate the transition period.
all.zh: 由雙方資深主管共同組成的整合管理辦公室將於下週成立，以協調過渡期間的相關事宜。

all.en: I understand that any announcement of this magnitude raises immediate concerns about restructuring and potential redundancy, and I want to address those concerns directly.
all.zh: 我明白如此重大的公告會立即引發對於組織重整與可能裁員的疑慮，我想直接回應這些擔憂。

all.en: After a detailed review of overlapping functions, we anticipate that fewer than two percent of positions worldwide will be affected, and the vast majority of those impacted will be offered redeployment within the new organization.
all.zh: 在詳細檢視重複職能後，我們預期全球受影響的職位將少於百分之二，且絕大多數受影響者將獲得在新組織內部重新派任的機會。

all.en: No frontline operational, warehouse, or driver positions will be eliminated as a result of this merger.
all.zh: 本次合併不會導致任何第一線營運、倉儲或駕駛職位遭到裁撤。

all.en: For any roles that cannot be retained, we are committed to providing generous severance packages, outplacement services, and at least six months of advance notice.
all.zh: 對於無法保留的職位，我們承諾提供優渥的資遣方案、再就業輔導服務，以及至少六個月的提前通知。

all.en: Existing employment contracts, accrued benefits, and pension entitlements will be fully honored under the laws of each jurisdiction.
all.zh: 現有的僱傭合約、已累積的福利與退休金權益將依各司法管轄區的法律完全受到尊重。

all.en: Communication with stakeholders is a top priority, and we have prepared tailored briefings for customers, suppliers, and union representatives that will be distributed later today.
all.zh: 與利害關係人溝通是首要任務，我們已為客戶、供應商與工會代表準備量身打造的簡報資料，將於今日稍晚發送。

all.en: A comprehensive FAQ document, organized by department and country, has been posted on the employee intranet under the heading 「One Team, One Future」.
all.zh: 一份依部門與國家分類的完整常見問答文件，已張貼於員工內部網路，標題為「One Team, One Future」。

all.en: I will personally host a series of town hall meetings starting Monday, both in person at our major hubs and via live webcast for colleagues working remotely.
all.zh: 我將於下週一起親自主持一系列說明會，於各主要據點實體舉行，並為遠距工作的同仁提供線上直播。

all.en: If you receive any inquiries from journalists, analysts, or competitors, please refer them to the corporate communications team rather than responding yourself.
all.zh: 若您接到記者、分析師或競爭對手的詢問，請將其轉介給企業傳播團隊，而非自行回應。

all.en: I want to thank every one of you for the dedication and professionalism that made our company attractive enough to undertake a partnership of this scale in the first place.
all.zh: 我要感謝各位每一位同仁的投入與專業精神，正是這份精神讓本公司具備足夠的吸引力，才得以推動如此規模的合作案。

all.en: Change is never easy, but I am genuinely confident that the new Northstar Pacific Group will offer broader career opportunities, stronger financial resources, and a more resilient platform for innovation.
all.zh: 改變從來都不容易，但我由衷相信，全新的 Northstar Pacific Group 將提供更廣闊的職涯機會、更穩健的財務資源，以及更具韌性的創新平台。

all.en: Thank you for your continued trust, your patience during this transition, and your unwavering commitment to serving our customers with excellence.
all.zh: 感謝各位持續的信任、過渡期間的耐心，以及對於以卓越服務客戶的堅定承諾。

all.en: Detailed information packages will be mailed to every employee's home address by the end of next week.
all.zh: 詳細的資訊資料將於下週底前郵寄至每位員工的居住地址。

all.en: A confidential hotline staffed by human resources professionals has been established for personal questions and concerns.
all.zh: 一條由人力資源專業人員接聽的機密熱線已設立，以回答個人的問題與疑慮。

all.en: We have also engaged an independent ombudsperson to ensure that all employee feedback receives fair consideration.
all.zh: 我們亦聘請了獨立的申訴專員，以確保所有員工的回饋皆能獲得公平的考量。

all.en: Customer service standards will remain our top operational priority throughout the entire integration period.
all.zh: 客戶服務標準在整個整合期間將持續是我們最優先的營運重點。

all.en: Existing client contracts will be reviewed individually to ensure that service terms are met or improved under the new structure.
all.zh: 現有客戶合約將個別審視，以確保新架構下的服務條件能維持或進一步提升。

all.en: Technology systems will be integrated in phases over the next eighteen months to minimize disruption to daily operations.
all.zh: 技術系統將於未來十八個月內分階段整合，以將對日常營運的影響降至最低。

all.en: Employees will receive priority access to internal job postings before any external recruitment campaigns begin.
all.zh: 員工將於任何對外招募活動展開之前，優先取得內部職缺資訊。

all.en: A combined corporate values workshop will be held in October to align both cultures around shared principles.
all.zh: 將於 10 月舉辦聯合企業價值觀工作坊，使兩家公司的文化在共同原則下達成一致。

all.en: Throughout this journey, transparency, fairness, and respect for every individual will remain non-negotiable commitments.
all.zh: 在整個過程中，透明、公平及對每位個人的尊重將始終是不可妥協的承諾。

all.en: I look forward to building this exciting next chapter alongside each one of you. Sincerely, James Whitaker, Chairman.
all.zh: 我期待與各位攜手共同開創這令人振奮的下一章。James Whitaker 董事長 敬上。

all.en: Following the announcement, our investor relations team will host a public conference call at 4 P.M. Eastern Time today.
all.zh: 公告發布後，我們的投資人關係團隊將於今日美東時間下午 4 點舉辦公開法人說明會。

all.en: Both legal teams have completed an extensive antitrust assessment confirming that the merger meets all applicable competition standards.
all.zh: 雙方法務團隊已完成廣泛的反托拉斯評估，確認本合併符合所有適用的競爭法規標準。

all.en: Senior managers will participate in a leadership alignment offsite next month to define joint priorities for the first year.
all.zh: 高階主管將於下個月參加領導階層整合異地會議，以確立合併後第一年的共同優先事項。

all.en: A unified employee assistance program will be rolled out to provide confidential counseling support throughout the transition.
all.zh: 將推出統一的員工協助方案，於過渡期間提供機密的諮商支援服務。

all.en: Both companies will continue to honor existing community sponsorship commitments and charitable partnerships without interruption.
all.zh: 兩家公司將持續履行現有的社區贊助承諾及慈善合作關係，不會中斷。

all.en: Our combined fleet will exceed twelve hundred vehicles and serve more than ninety international port destinations weekly.
all.zh: 我們合併後的車隊將超過一千二百輛車，每週服務超過九十個國際港口目的地。

all.en: Sustainability remains central to our strategy, and we will accelerate joint investments in low-emission transportation technology.
all.zh: 永續發展仍是我們策略的核心，我們將加速對低排放運輸技術的共同投資。

all.en: Cultural integration teams in every region will document local practices to ensure valued traditions are respected and preserved.
all.zh: 各區域的文化整合團隊將紀錄當地實務，以確保受重視的傳統得以受到尊重並保留。

all.en: Recognition programs from both legacy organizations will be combined into a single enhanced rewards framework next year.
all.zh: 兩家原有組織的表彰計畫將於明年合併為一套強化版的單一獎勵架構。

all.en: Please join me in welcoming our future colleagues with the same warmth and professionalism that defines our company today.
all.zh: 請與我一同以本公司今日所代表的熱情與專業精神，歡迎我們未來的同事。
